---
title: "ML and Game Theory"
description: "AlphaZero, CFR, multi-agent RL, GANs as games, adversarial robustness."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="ml-and-gt"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>ML and Game Theory</h1>
  <p class="lead">AlphaZero, CFR, multi-agent RL, GANs as games, adversarial robustness.</p>
</div>
```
